title: Natural killer cells
abstract: This invention relates to Natural Killer (NK) cell populations, to methods of producing the same and therapeutic applications thereof. More specifically, the invention relates to the expansion of IMK cells by increasing the expression of specific transcription factors associated with NK cell production.
claims: 1. An ex vivo method for expanding an NK cell population, comprising the steps of: a) culturing an haematopoietic progenitor cell (HPC) comprising sample obtained from an individual; b) contacting said sample with a compound that inhibits the action of REV-ERB; and c) expanding said cells in vitro to produce an NK cell population; wherein the compound has formula (I):
